---
title: "My Shiny App Title"
description: "One-sentence description of the app"
date: 2025-01-15
categories: [Shiny, R, Interactive]
image: "../assets/thumbnails/app-one.png"  # optional screenshot
toc: true
---

## Overview

Write 2–3 paragraphs here explaining:

- **What the app does** — the problem it solves and who uses it
- **Why you built it** — the motivation or context
- **What's interesting about it** — a key technical or design decision

## Live App

```{=html}
<!-- Replace the src URL with your shinyapps.io URL -->
<iframe
  src="https://yourusername.shinyapps.io/your-app/"
  class="shiny-embed"
  frameborder="0"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
```

> The app is hosted on [shinyapps.io](https://shinyapps.io) (free tier — may take a moment to wake up).
> [Open in new tab ↗](https://yourusername.shinyapps.io/your-app/){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}

## How It Works

Explain the key technical pieces. Use code blocks to highlight interesting parts.

```r
# Example: a reactive that filters data based on user input
filtered_data <- reactive({
  data |>
    filter(
      year >= input$year_range[1],
      year <= input$year_range[2],
      region %in% input$regions
    )
})
```

### UI structure

Briefly describe how the UI is laid out — sidebar, tabs, panels, etc.

### Key packages

| Package | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `shiny` | App framework |
| `bslib` | Bootstrap 5 theming |
| `plotly` | Interactive charts |
| `DT` | Interactive tables |

## Data

Describe the dataset: source, size, any cleaning steps. If the data is public, link to it.

```r
# Data loading and cleaning
data <- read_csv("data/my-data.csv") |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  filter(!is.na(key_variable))
```

## Source Code

The full source is on [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/your-app). Contributions and suggestions welcome.
